title: Make button add two columns together
excerpt: Is there a way to have a button clicked and then it will add two columns together and put it in the third column?

posts.author: agalgano (Anthony)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to have a button clicked and then it will add two columns together and put it in the third column?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @agalgano - you could use a formula column to do this quite easily. However if you want the value casted to a regular Number column you should check out Column Magic or General Caster as they will allow for calculations and casting to columns on click.

Hope this helps!
Mark
